articles.title: Arsenal limp to semis but Arteta wanted fire - does style matter?

articles.title: 'He's done it!' - Diaz scores stunner to earn Bayern late win
articles.summary: Luis Diaz scores a powerful strike from the edge of the box to break 10-man Real Madrid's resistance, as Bayern Munich take a late lead in their Champions League quarter-final tie.
